dialogues: Same product every time. But here's what we need to figure out: is this a coincidence, or does this always happen? And if it always happens... why?
That's three arrays now. Every time there were two expressions, same product. 15 and 15. 20 and 20. 21 and 21. Why do you think both expressions give the same product?
Right. No dots changed. You just looked at the same dots a different way. Same dots has to mean same total. That's why the products match.
But can we prove it even more clearly? Watch this.
